testcase.name: test_scheduler_dedupe_with_bson_dates
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter3.py:199: in test_scheduler_dedupe_with_bson_dates assert pid in sent1 E AssertionError: assert '6a5c427ac3a7a13c86b9a239' in []

testcase.name: test_tier2_after_10

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='group-stream-admin.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/auth/register (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='group-stream-admin.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfc41d2e9c610>, 'Connection to group-stream-admin.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)'))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E TimeoutError: timed out

(connect timeout=15)')
